reviews.review_title: Hi I have not play this game
reviews.review_description: But when I got this game I started to look at the reviews and I am going to play it now I just play the and … IT IS THE BEST GAME IN THE WORLD IT IS SOOOOOO GOOD GO PLAY IT NOW GUYS IT IS THE BEST GAME EVER AND THE ONLY BEST GAME EVER MADE IN THE ENTIRE WORLD ￼
This game is extremely good and interesting and I don’t want to stop playing!
Hi, I’m the modeler for the game, and I gotta say, Oddman and Skiplaw did an amazing joh making this, its really well put together. Graphics and movement is amazing, download it now!

First review! Ain’t that crazy! This game is an amazing place to hang out with your friends. I have fun playing in game and getting to meet some of you guys! I recommend you download this game because there are a ton of fun features that make this game playable for hours! Thanks to everyone who has played the game and to the people who are soon to download it!

reviews.review_title: Can I please be moderator in your game
reviews.review_description: The reason why I want to be moderator in your game because there’s so many moderators, so I want to ban all those moderators
